hero.title: Master Medical Exams with Confidence
hero.subtitle: Practice thousands of MCQs, simulate real exams, and track your progress like a pro medical student.

targetedTraining.title: Targeted Practice
targetedTraining.description: Access thousands of MCQs organized by subject and difficulty level for a personalized learning experience.

examSimulation.title: Realistic Exam Simulations
examSimulation.description: Prepare effectively with mock exams that replicate real testing conditions and time constraints.

progressTracking.title: Advanced Progress Tracking
progressTracking.description: Monitor your performance, identify weak areas, and track your improvement over time.

detailedExplanations.title: Detailed Explanations
detailedExplanations.description: Learn from every question with clear explanations that help you understand the underlying concepts.

questionBank.title: Extensive Question Bank
questionBank.description: Practice with a large collection of high-quality medical questions covering multiple specialties.

about.title: About MedQCM
about.subtitle: Helping medical students prepare smarter and achieve their academic goals through modern exam preparation tools.
about.description: MedQCM was created to provide medical students with a comprehensive and accessible platform for practicing multiple-choice questions, simulating real exams, and monitoring their progress. Our mission is to make exam preparation more effective, engaging, and data-driven.

quality.title: High-Quality Content
quality.description: Questions are carefully organized to help students practice efficiently and confidently.

accessibility.title: Accessible Learning
accessibility.description: Study anytime, anywhere, from any device with a seamless experience.

performance.title: Performance Focused
performance.description: Track your strengths and weaknesses with detailed statistics and progress reports.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start for free and upgrade when you're ready.

trial.name: Free Trial
trial.description: Explore the platform and experience how MedQCM can help you prepare for your exams.
